description: A Go CLI for Google's Universal Commerce Protocol — talk to UCP merchants over REST or MCP, search across them in parallel, build carts, and prep checkout drafts that an AP2 CLI can authorize.

novel_features.name: UCP merchant manifest validator
novel_features.description: Fetch `/.well-known/ucp` for any domain and return a graded report covering schema validity, advertised transports, and capability coverage — works against any merchant publishing a UCP manifest, including MCP-only Shopify-hosted stores.

novel_features.name: Bundled pure-Go mock UCP merchant
novel_features.description: Spawn a UCP-compliant reference merchant locally (pure-Go, no external runtime) so `ucp check`, `search`, `cart`, and `checkout prep` flows work end-to-end without a third-party UCP merchant or extra language toolchains.
